officialEmailUse: Submitted after the owner confirmed use of this email and completed OTP verification in the browser.
description: GCA, short for Go China Access, is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token on Base Mainnet. It is a concept-stage community direction focused on the Go China macro narrative, bilingual Web3 education, public market research, and planned access to non-custodial quant risk tools. The intended Web3 Radar bridge is an access and membership layer for reports, risk-warning credits, backtests, ENTRY_READY signal review, position-size calculators, subscription discounts, and risk-control training. The contract created 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls. The token has starter Uniswap v3 GCA/WETH liquidity on Base Mainnet and a disclosed owner-held reserve wallet.

liquidity.liquidityDepthNote: Starter-depth only; trades can have high price impact and slippage.
